mapper.sql: c.id, c.user_id, c.experiment_id, c.root_id, c.parent_id, c.reply_to_user_id, c.content, c.like_count, c.status, c.reject_reason, c.reviewed_by, c.reviewed_time, c.create_time, c.update_time, u.nickname AS nickname, ru.nickname AS reply_to_nickname
FROM sys_comment c INNER JOIN `user` u ON u.id = c.user_id LEFT JOIN `user` ru ON ru.id = c.reply_to_user_id
mapper.select:
SELECT , FALSE AS liked_by_current_user, FALSE AS owned_by_current_user
WHERE c.id = #{id}

SELECT , FALSE AS liked_by_current_user, FALSE AS owned_by_current_user
WHERE c.status = 'APPROVED' ORDER BY c.create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_comment c
c.status = 'PENDING'
AND c.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND c.experiment_id = #{experimentId}
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_comment SET status = #{status}, reject_reason = #{reviewComment}, reviewed_by = #{reviewedBy}, reviewed_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
